opportunity.title: Show HN: An open-source safety net for home hemodialysis
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The criticality of fail-safes here highlights a key tradeoff in decentralized systems: increased resilience comes at the cost of observability and debugging complexity. Architecting for graceful degradation—specifically, pre-defined fallback behaviors when sensor data drifts outside expected ranges—becomes paramount, and that requires a robust cognitive architecture to manage. It’s fascinating to see this applied to a life-critical use case.
actions.reasoning: My experience with building agentic systems for resource constrained environments translates well to the challenges of a safety-critical, home-based monitoring system.
